_publications._publicationTitle: Sex Is a major determinant of neuronal dysfunction in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: only male Nf1-CKO mice exhibited increased hippocampal Ras activation and ERK1/2 phosphorylation (activation) relative to controls (Fig 4E, F)
details: Successfully detected increased hippocampal Ras activation specifically in male Nf1-CKO mice but not females
